entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Please continue forward with the next logical step which is ensuring the CLI and the Win32 GUI IDE are both properly accessible in features. Also ensure the QT files are also eliminated and completely converted to pure either x64 MASM for performance and C++ for bridges/architecture if need be'
